events.title: Hidden Supply Cache
events.body: A hidden rebel supply cache has been discovered near your position. It looks untouched — but moving it carries some risk.

choices.label: Claim it quietly
choices.flavor: Recover the supplies under cover of darkness.

choices.label: Leave it — too risky
choices.flavor: Better safe than sorry.

events.title: Anonymous Dead Drop
events.body: An encrypted message arrives with coordinates for a dead drop. The sender is unknown but the information looks credible.

choices.label: Send someone to investigate
choices.flavor: The drop contains credits and useful intelligence — if it's real.

choices.label: Ignore it — could be a trap
choices.flavor: You can't afford to take chances.

events.title: Safehouse Compromised
events.body: Intel suggests Imperial agents may have identified one of your safehouses. You have a narrow window to act.

choices.label: Evacuate immediately
choices.flavor: Relocation is costly but personnel stay safe.

choices.label: Stay put and monitor
choices.flavor: You gather useful intel but local trust erodes.

events.title: Communications Flagged
events.body: Signals analysis suggests your comm frequencies have been flagged by Imperial monitoring stations. You need to respond.

choices.label: Switch to new protocols
choices.flavor: Burn a comm unit to secure your network.

choices.label: Broadcast disinformation
choices.flavor: Feed them noise and gather intel from their response.

events.title: Imperial Defector
events.body: A low-ranking Imperial officer reaches out claiming to have information to sell. The risk is real — but so is the opportunity.

choices.label: Pay for the intel
choices.flavor: A significant investment, but the data is solid.

choices.label: Refuse — can't trust them
choices.flavor: Too many defectors have turned out to be plants.

choices.label: String them along
choices.flavor: Partial information, no payment — and no commitment.

events.title: Unguarded Convoy
events.body: A sympathiser reports an Imperial supply convoy moving through the area with minimal escort. The window is short.

choices.label: Raid the convoy
choices.flavor: Logistics cost, but the haul is worth it — if the escort is really as light as reported.

choices.label: Report the location to allies
choices.flavor: Build goodwill and local support instead.

choices.label: Ignore it
choices.flavor: Not worth the exposure right now.

events.title: Contact Goes Dark
events.body: One of your key contacts has stopped responding. The silence has lasted too long — something is wrong.

choices.label: Send someone to investigate
choices.flavor: Costly, but you need to know what happened — and hope the contact wasn't turned.

choices.label: Wait and hope
choices.flavor: The uncertainty spreads. Local morale suffers.

choices.label: Cut contact entirely
choices.flavor: Safe — but the network is gone.

events.title: Equipment Malfunction
events.body: Critical comm equipment has malfunctioned at the worst possible time. Operations are degraded until it's resolved.

choices.label: Emergency field repair
choices.flavor: Burn a unit to get back online fast.

choices.label: Improvise with what you have
choices.flavor: Information quality degrades across the network.

choices.label: Request resupply
choices.flavor: Slower but you end up better equipped than before.
